request_payload.exposure_text: Just saw this in my local news - our civil defense systems are woefully unprepared because of bureaucratic neglect. We can't afford to wait for another crisis to hit. It's time to demand real investment in local preparedness before it's too late. #CommunitySafety #PreparednessNow
